name: Tekko-kagi
description:
An exotic melee weapon. 
 The tekko-kagi is an exotic weapon that serves as a bladed extension of the hand. Depending on what culture or people are wielding them, the tekko-kagi is referred to by many names, such as the bear claw or the tiger's claw. The most common users of the tekko-kagi are sects of monks and druids who worship the natural world, wishing to emulate the spirits they revere through their weaponry.
